requires: A security-audit skill compatible with your CLI (e.g. OMC /security-audit or equivalent)

nudges.message: nudge: 3+ files written — run /security-audit before committing to catch exposed secrets, unsafe patterns, and OWASP issues introduced this session.
nudges.comment: Requires a /security-audit skill. Fires after 3 write-tool calls as a pre-commit security gate.

nudges.message: nudge: if touching auth, sessions, or permissions this session — run /security-audit before presenting. Auth changes need adversarial review for bypasses and privilege escalation.
nudges.comment: Requires a /security-audit skill. Fires once per session as a pre-task reminder when auth work is planned.

nudges.message: nudge: adding packages this session? Run a CVE audit after any npm install / pip install — look for or build a dependency-audit skill that gates on high/critical findings.
nudges.comment: Requires a dependency-audit skill or manual npm audit / pip-audit. Fires once per day.

nudges.message: nudge: 5+ files written — run a final /security-audit pass before the session ends. Covers secrets, injection vectors, and unsafe subprocess calls.
nudges.comment: Requires a /security-audit skill. Fires after 5 write-tool calls as a final-pass gate.

nudges.message: nudge: 20 tool calls in — grep staged files for secrets before committing: API keys, tokens, and connection strings are the most common accidental leaks.
nudges.comment: Vanilla-compatible reminder; no skill required. Fires every 20 tool calls as a secrets hygiene checkpoint.

nudges.message: nudge: new UI output this session? Verify encoding to prevent XSS — look for or build a /security-audit skill that checks template output and innerHTML assignments.
nudges.comment: Requires a /security-audit skill with XSS detection. Fires after 3 write-tool calls.
